Hero.subtitle: We transform ideas into content that connects — video, audio, graphic design, and web, crafted for brands that want to stand out across North Africa and beyond.

About.label: About Kashf
About.body1: Kashf (كشف) means revelation — the moment something hidden becomes clear. We uncover the authentic voice of every person, brand, or project and make it powerfully visible online.
About.body2: Based in Tunisia, operating globally. We serve clients in Arabic, French, and English — across video, audio, design, and web — as standalone services or integrated production packs.

Services.label: What We Do
Services.title: Our Services
Services.subtitle: Available standalone or bundled in integrated production packs — starting from a single deliverable to full campaigns.
Services.video_desc: From short films and documentaries to brand stories and social media reels — we craft visuals that move people.
Services.audio_desc: Podcasts, voice-overs, jingles, and full sound design. Your message, perfectly heard.
Services.graphics_desc: Logos, brand identities, social visuals, and print materials that communicate instantly and memorably.
Services.web_desc: Modern, fast, and accessible websites and platforms built with the latest technologies — from landing pages to full e-commerce.
Services.packsDesc: Bundle video, audio, design, and web into cohesive brand packages. Better results, better value — built around your goals.

WhyUs.label: Why Choose Us
WhyUs.title: Built Different
WhyUs.item1Desc: We deliver in Arabic, French, and English — reaching audiences across North Africa, Europe, and beyond. No translation needed.
WhyUs.item2Desc: From strategy and script to final delivery, we handle every stage. One team. One vision. Zero handoff gaps.
WhyUs.item3Desc: Tight deadlines? Our team thrives. Speed, quality, and honest communication — every time, without compromise.

Process.label: How We Work
Process.title: Our Process
Process.step1Desc: Deep dive into your brand, goals, and audience to shape the right strategy.
Process.step2Desc: Production begins — scripts, visuals, audio, code — all under one roof.
Process.step3Desc: Collaborative feedback rounds to sharpen every detail until it's perfect.
Process.step4Desc: Final delivery, publishing support, and performance tracking.

Testimonial.quote: Kashf transformed our brand presence across North Africa. The team's multilingual approach and attention to detail is unmatched.
Testimonial.author: Ahmed Benali

Contact.label: Get In Touch
Contact.title: Ready to become
Contact.subtitle: Tell us about your project — we'll get back to you within 24 hours with a tailored proposal that fits your goals and budget.
Contact.name: Your name *
Contact.disclaimer: We respond within 24 hours · No spam, ever
Contact.successDesc: We'll get back to you within 24 hours. Check your inbox!
